arts.ttl: Bilbao battle shows Rangers are 'united' as 2 Ibrox heroes step out of comfort zone
arts.sum: Raskin was impressed with his team and reckons the result shows how tight the group is

arts.ttl: Nicolas Raskin urges Rangers to do 'dirty work' in Bilbao as star welcomes back key men for Europa League battle
arts.sum: Raskin will be pleased to see John Souttar and Mohamed Diomande come back into the team
